services.title: WordPress Development
services.description: Custom themes, plugin integrations, WooCommerce builds, and performance-first websites designed to convert.

services.title: Server Setup
services.description: VPS and dedicated server configuration with Nginx, Apache, SSL, backups, monitoring, and hardening.

services.title: Business Email
services.description: Domain mail setup for Google Workspace, Yandex 360, or cPanel with SPF, DKIM, and DMARC configured correctly.

services.title: Design From Scratch
services.description: Interface design in Figma, from wireframes to polished, brand-specific layouts ready for development.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: A custom online store with payment integration, account flows, and a sharper buying journey that improved conversions.

projects.title: Corporate Website
projects.description: A business site paired with server setup, company mail, and CRM-ready infrastructure for a cleaner internal workflow.

projects.title: Landing Page
projects.description: A high-speed animated landing page built from scratch with pixel-accurate implementation and strong page performance.

home.heroDescription: WordPress development, server setup, business email, and bespoke design. From concept to launch, every detail is built to support your brand.
home.sectionsTitle: Separate pages for every key area

sectionCards.title: Services
sectionCards.description: Dedicated page for delivery areas, infrastructure work, and design support.

sectionCards.title: Skills
sectionCards.description: Separate route for stack overview, strengths, and supporting tools.

sectionCards.title: Projects
sectionCards.description: Focused portfolio page instead of mixing all project content into the homepage.

sectionCards.title: Contact
sectionCards.description: Direct route for communication channels and project inquiries.

servicesPage.heroTitle: Solutions for launch, growth, and stability
servicesPage.heroLead: Each service is presented as a distinct offer with a clearer delivery shape, so this page reads more like a sales deck than a generic list.
servicesPage.introTitle: Built for businesses that need clarity, speed, and clean execution
outcomes: Pages built around business goals, not generic sections
Cleaner handoff for clients who need to manage the site later
Direct support with launch and delivery details

packages.name: Launch Site
packages.summary: For a new offer, product, or service that needs a sharp first impression.

packages.name: Business Website
packages.summary: For companies that need structure, credibility, and clearer service communication.

packages.name: Tech Setup
packages.summary: For projects that already have a site but need infrastructure cleaned up.

processSteps.title: Discovery
processSteps.description: Scope, priorities, audience, and goals are defined before design or code starts.

processSteps.title: Design Direction
processSteps.description: The visual language and page structure are aligned to the brand and conversion goal.

processSteps.title: Implementation
processSteps.description: Frontend, CMS, or infrastructure work is delivered with performance and maintainability in mind.

processSteps.title: Launch
processSteps.description: Deployment, final checks, and handoff are completed so the site is ready for production.

servicesPage.deliveryBody: Planning, execution, launch support, and the technical cleanup needed to hand over a stable result instead of a fragile prototype.
servicesPage.nextBody: If the scope is already clear, move to the contact page and send the project requirements directly.

skillsPage.heroLead: This page is structured to show technical confidence, not just logos. It explains what the stack is used for and how it supports delivery.
skillsPage.workflowTitle: Design, build, and launch stay inside one process
skillsPage.coreLead: Design, development, and deployment stay inside one process instead of being split across disconnected specialists.

groups.title: Build
groups.body: Next.js, React patterns, semantic markup, responsive layout systems, and production-minded frontend implementation.

groups.title: Design
groups.body: Page structure, visual hierarchy, landing page storytelling, Figma layouts, and sharper calls to action.

groups.title: Operations
groups.body: Linux server setup, web stack configuration, business email records, SSL, and deployment basics.

principles.title: Strategy before decoration
principles.body: The page structure and message hierarchy are solved before visual polish starts.

principles.title: Fast pages by default
principles.body: Performance is treated as a requirement, not a cleanup phase after the build is done.

principles.title: Systems over fragments
principles.body: Sections, spacing, and components are built to work together instead of feeling assembled at random.

principles.title: Practical handoff
principles.body: The final result should be maintainable and understandable after launch, not only attractive in a screenshot.

projectsPage.heroTitle: Selected work built for business results
projectsPage.heroLead: The portfolio page is designed to feel like a proper case-study index: outcomes first, visual proof second, and enough context to make the work credible.
projectsPage.categoryLead: Browse by category, then open the demo builds inside each one to see more specific project directions and visual references.

categories.title: E-Commerce Platform
categories.summary: Online stores, product storytelling, checkout clarity, and conversion-focused user flows.

demos.title: Luna Market
demos.subtitle: Lifestyle commerce storefront
demos.description: A premium storefront concept with cleaner product hierarchy, stronger campaign areas, and a more modern mobile shopping flow.
demos.result: Sharper product discovery and a lighter path from collection page to checkout.

demos.title: North Supply
demos.subtitle: Outdoor gear retail demo
demos.description: A category-led shopping demo for an outdoor brand built around merchandising, bundles, and editorial product presentation.
demos.result: Stronger visual storytelling around products and better separation between campaigns and core catalogue.

demos.title: Atelier Beauty
demos.subtitle: Cosmetics and bundles concept
demos.description: A beauty e-commerce direction focused on trust, repeat purchase behaviour, and cleaner product education blocks.
demos.result: A softer premium feel paired with clearer bundle logic and faster route to purchase.

categories.title: Corporate Website
categories.summary: Company presentation sites, service architecture, trust signals, and clearer lead generation.

demos.title: Vertex Group
demos.subtitle: Industrial company website
demos.description: A polished corporate direction for an engineering team that needed clearer service structure and a more current visual system.
demos.result: More credible first impression, improved service legibility, and a stronger inquiry path.

demos.title: Harbor Advisory
demos.subtitle: Consulting firm presentation
demos.description: A consulting website concept focused on authority, team presentation, and case-led trust building for new leads.
demos.result: A calmer, higher-trust interface that positions the team with more clarity and confidence.

demos.title: Axis Logistics
demos.subtitle: Logistics and operations demo
demos.description: A practical corporate layout for a logistics business combining service depth, network coverage, and contact readiness.
demos.result: A more structured business presence that makes complex service information easier to scan.

categories.title: Landing Page
categories.summary: Campaign pages, product launches, focused offers, and performance-driven message sequencing.

demos.title: Spark Launch
demos.subtitle: Startup product reveal page
demos.description: A fast-moving launch page concept designed for product reveal campaigns and early waitlist acquisition.
demos.result: Clearer sequencing from problem to product to signup, with lighter friction on the hero section.

demos.title: Frame Studio
demos.subtitle: Creative service promo page
demos.description: A bold service landing page for a creative studio with editorial rhythm, large typography, and focused conversion points.
demos.result: A more distinct tone and better retention of the core offer above the fold.

demos.title: Pulse Event
demos.subtitle: Conference registration page
demos.description: A promotional landing page for an event campaign with speaker sections, timeline blocks, and conversion-focused registration areas.
demos.result: Stronger attendee motivation with clearer event value and cleaner signup emphasis.

stories.name: Retail Brand
stories.challenge: Needed a storefront that looked more premium and made checkout feel less heavy.
stories.solution: Reworked the page flow, simplified product browsing, and tightened the buying path.
stories.result: Stronger product focus and a clearer purchase journey.

stories.name: Corporate Team
stories.challenge: The old website looked dated and the infrastructure was scattered across multiple tools.
stories.solution: Rebuilt the presentation layer and aligned mail, hosting, and technical setup into one cleaner system.
stories.result: A more credible company presence and easier day-to-day maintenance.

stories.name: Startup Offer
stories.challenge: Needed to move fast with a launch page that could support paid traffic and early validation.
stories.solution: Created a focused landing page with stronger message sequencing and lighter front-end execution.
stories.result: A clearer acquisition page that was ready for immediate testing.

projectsPage.quoteTitle: The goal is not to show volume. It is to show decision quality.
projectsPage.quoteLead: Every case is framed around what changed for the business: clearer messaging, better structure, stronger presentation, or cleaner technical execution.

contactPage.heroLead: This page is designed to be shareable on its own: concise, direct, and clear about what happens after the first message.
contactPage.channelsTitle: Reach me where it is easiest
contactPage.channelsLead: For quick communication, direct channels work best. For structured requests, use the form and describe the project clearly.
promises: Clear response on scope and feasibility
No vague proposal language or inflated deliverables
Direct discussion about timeline, pages, and technical needs

faqs.question: Do you handle deployment too?
faqs.answer: Yes. Deployment, hosting setup, DNS, SSL, and launch checks can be included in the delivery.

faqs.question: Can you redesign an existing site?
faqs.answer: Yes. Existing projects can be refreshed, reorganized, or rebuilt depending on the condition and target outcome.

faqs.question: Can you work with an existing design?
faqs.answer: Yes. I can implement an approved design system or improve the current one when needed.
